stemHtml: Which of the following statements defines the power required?

options.a: The thrust required to overcome drag to maintain accelerating level flight in ISA conditions.
options.b: The power that is needed to maintain unaccelerated level flight for a set of conditions.
options.c: The reduction in thrust required to maintain straight and level flight as weight reduces.
options.d: The available power to overcome drag to maintain straight and level flight.
